column1: # Default partition table for the 8 MB ESP32-S3 build. Remote ID (Bluetooth/NimBLE) is enabled in the base sdkconfig
# the NimBLE stack adds ~400-450 KB of code that does not fit the 1.5 MB app of the stock partitions_singleapp_large
# the factory app is grown to 3 MB (ample headroom in 8 MB flash; there is no OTA scheme to preserve). Referenced by the
